name: Supabase
desc: Hosted Postgres database with authentication, instant APIs, edge functions, and real-time subscriptions.

name: DigitalOcean
desc: Deploy Linux virtual machines (Droplets), Kubernetes clusters, databases, and app platform services.

name: Railway
desc: Deploy your backend code, databases, and cron jobs instantly with zero configuration.

name: Clerk
desc: Complete user management, sign-up, sign-in, and multi-tenant auth UI components for React and Next.js.

name: Neon Postgres
desc: Serverless Postgres with instant branching, autoscaling, and bottomless storage.

name: Resend
desc: Email service for developers. Send transactional emails using React Email templates.

name: DeepInfra
desc: Inexpensive, serverless API endpoints for Llama, Mistral, Whisper, and other open LLMs.

name: Together AI
desc: Fast serverless inference API for open-source AI models and custom fine-tuning.

name: Retool
desc: Fast way to build internal tools. Drag-and-drop UI components connected to your databases and APIs.
